aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Changed-file cleanup pass completed. Fallback scan found only the existing direct-stream fallback feature, classified as an intentional user-facing alternate path. UI callback type filtering and browse-result quality labeling were tightened before re-verification.

commands: uv run python -c "from station_scout.radio_browser import RadioBrowserClient; c=RadioBrowserClient(); f=c.browse_facets('genre', limit=1)[0]; print(f.name, f.station_count); stations=c.browse_stations(f, limit=3); print([(s.name, s.discovery_quality_score()) for s in stations])"
verification.evidence: 84 tests passed; Ruff passed; source and wheel builds succeeded; diff whitespace check passed; live Radio Browser browse smoke returned a genre facet and sorted station scores.

codeReview.evidence: Reviewed changed app, model, client, and test surfaces. No security, correctness, accessibility-boundary, or architecture blockers found. Browse data layer preserves existing search behavior, quality ranking is deterministic, and UI integration reuses the existing background/result/playback flow.
